'''yokazhaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:vectorial|vectorial]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-k-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vectorial|vectorial]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| yokazhaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || yokazhithi || yokazhiji || yokazhishi || yokazhiki
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || yokazhuthu || yokazhuju || yokazhushu || yokazhuku
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || yokazhuthu || yokazhuju || yokazhushu || yokazhuku
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || yokazhufthuf || yokazhufjuf || yokazhufshuf || yokazhufkuf
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || yokazhethe || yokazheje || yokazheshe || yokazheke
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || yokazhotho || yokazhojo || yokazhosho || yokazhoko
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || yokazhotho || yokazhojo || yokazhosho || yokazhoko
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || yokazhofthof || yokazhofjof || yokazhofshof || yokazhofkof
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || yokazhïfthïf || yokazhïfjïf || yokazhïfshïf || yokazhïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || yokazhïfthïf || yokazhïfjïf || yokazhïfshïf || yokazhïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || yokazhïfthïf || yokazhïfjïf || yokazhïfshïf || yokazhïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || yokazhïfthïf || yokazhïfjïf || yokazhïfshïf || yokazhïfkïf
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || yokazhæthæ || yokazhæjæ || yokazhæshæ || yokazhækæ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || yokazhatha || yokazhaja || yokazhasha || yokazhaka
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || yokazhatha || yokazhaja || yokazhasha || yokazhaka
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || yokazhafthaf || yokazhafjaf || yokazhafshaf || yokazhafkaf
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || yokazhasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || yokazhshëasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || yokazhroasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || yokazhmuasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || yokazhyaasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || goyokazhnkshëasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || goyokazhnkroasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || goyokazhnkmuasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || goyokazhnkyaasha
|-
| [[comparative]].none || yokakazhasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || yokakazhshëasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || yokakazhroasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || yokakazhmuasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || yokakazhyaasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || goyokakazhnkshëasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || goyokakazhnkroasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || goyokakazhnkmuasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || goyokakazhnkyaasha
|-
| [[superlative]].none || yekæzhasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || yekæzhshëasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || yekæzhroasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || yekæzhmuasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || yekæzhyaasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || goyekæzhnkshëasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || goyekæzhnkroasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || goyekæzhnkmuasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || goyekæzhnkyaasha
|-
| [[negative]].none || yokfazhasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || yokfazhshëasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || yokfazhroasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || yokfazhmuasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || yokfazhyaasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || goyokfazhnkshëasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || goyokfazhnkroasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || goyokfazhnkmuasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || goyokfazhnkyaasha
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words 5bad82d]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|5a3fb4a}}
